productName: Stars & Rosin - Ambrosia x Banana Cream Rosin - .5g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Ambrosia and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of lavender, sage, and tropical, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
